feat.name: Come at Me!
feat.text: You're a legendary duelist, welcoming all challengers, enabling you to challenge many foes even while other challenges are active. There is no longer a limit to the number of Pistolero's Challenges you can have in effect at one time.

traits.name: Gunslinger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the gunslinger class.
